skills.name: Razor Sharp/Spare Shot
skills.description: Halves sharpness loss. For bows and bowguns, shots have a chance not to expend coatings or ammo.

levels.description: Halves sharpness loss. For bows and bowguns, shots have a chance not to expend coatings or ammo.

skills.name: Flinch Free
skills.description: Prevents knockbacks and other reactions to small damage.

levels.description: Prevents knockbacks. Increases some Kinsect extract effects.
Prevents knockbacks. Tripping is reduced to a knockback. Increases some Kinsect extract effects.
Prevents knockbacks and tripping. Increases some Kinsect extract effects.

skills.name: Special Ammo Boost
skills.description: Increases the power of bowgun special ammo, Dragon Piercer, and Thousand Dragons.

levels.description: Increases the power of bowgun special ammo, Dragon Piercer, and Thousand Dragons by 10%.
Increases the power of bowgun special ammo, Dragon Piercer, and Thousand Dragons by 20%.

skills.name: Power Prolonger
skills.description: Allows long swords, dual blades, insect glaives, switch axes, and charge blades to stay powered up longer.

levels.description: Slightly increases the duration weapons are powered up.
Increases the duration weapons are powered up.
Greatly increases the duration weapons are powered up.

skills.name: Blight Resistance
skills.description: Grants protection against all elemental blights.

levels.description: Reduces the duration of all elemental blights by 50%.
Reduces the duration of all elemental blights by 75%.
Nullifies all elemental blights.

skills.description: Prevents knockbacks and other reactions to small damage.

levels.description: Prevents knockbacks. Increases some Kinsect extract effects.
Prevents knockbacks. Tripping is reduced to a knockback. Increases some Kinsect extract effects.
Prevents knockbacks and tripping. Increases some Kinsect extract effects.

skills.name: Critical Boost
skills.description: Increases the damage of critical hits.

levels.description: Increases damage dealt by critical hits to 30%.
Increases damage dealt by critical hits to 35%.
Increases damage dealt by critical hits to 40%.
